context: Tests whether the agent implements exchange rate caching with the correct TTL strategy, fetches from an appropriate API, applies psychological pricing rounding rules per the skill's specifications, and handles zero-decimal currencies and missing rate edge cases correctly.

checklist.name: Redis cache key
checklist.description: The exchange rate cache uses the key 'exchange_rates' (not a different key name)

checklist.name: 24-hour TTL
checklist.description: The cache TTL for display rates is set to 86400 seconds (24 hours), expressed as 60 * 60 * 24 or equivalent

checklist.name: Daily vs real-time distinction
checklist.description: Code or comments distinguish between daily cached rates for display and real-time rates for payment processing (e.g. a comment explaining this, or separate functions)

checklist.name: OXR or Fixer API
checklist.description: Exchange rate API URL references openexchangerates.org, fixer.io, or a named equivalent (not just a placeholder example.com URL)

checklist.name: Base currency returns early
checklist.description: convertPrice returns the original amount unchanged when targetCurrency equals the base currency (USD), without applying a rate

checklist.name: Missing rate error
checklist.description: convertPrice throws an error (not returns 0 or undefined) when the rate for a requested currency is not found

checklist.name: Sub-$10 rounds to .99
checklist.description: roundPrice produces an amount ending in .99 for input amounts less than 10 (e.g. 7.3 → 7.99)

checklist.name: $10-$99 rounds to nearest $0.05
checklist.description: roundPrice for amounts between 10 and 99 rounds to nearest $0.05 increment (e.g. uses Math.round(amount * 20) / 20 or equivalent logic)

checklist.name: $100+ rounds to whole number
checklist.description: roundPrice for amounts >= 100 returns a whole number (Math.round)

checklist.name: JPY rounds to integer
checklist.description: roundPrice for JPY (decimalDigits === 0) returns Math.round of the input, not a decimal

checklist.name: Demo includes JPY
checklist.description: The demo output includes at least one JPY conversion example showing a whole-number result

checklist.name: Cache check before fetch
checklist.description: getExchangeRates checks the cache first and only fetches from the API when no cached value exists
